items.name_cn:
P👏Premium Original👏New Bea Small Tote
Soft leather, fine and wear-resistant texture, classic metal logo is highly recognizable. Minimalist and elegant design, suitable for both hand-carry and shoulder carry, works for both commuting and casual wear. Moderate capacity, easily holds daily essentials, practical and stylish! The Bea series focuses on a relaxed vibe, easy to handle in both work and life, one of Y's popular models😎
Model: 872469
Size: 18x15x13cm

items.name_cn:
P🆕【Premium Original】🔥【Exclusive Background】🌈Elephant Print
New Elephant Print NIKai Front Flap Bag, accented with metal LE CASSANDRE, featuring convertible leather and chain shoulder straps. The popular NIKI Elephant Print is a favorite among many stars and influencers, hard to find in stores. The globally popular NIKI features a large capacity and elephant print cowhide! The craftsmanship is very complex, offering you a unique visual effect! An absolute must-have style!👑
Model: 633178
Size: 28X20X8.5cm
